title: Cisco ACI Leaf/Spine Physical Interface Utilization — Bytes, Drops, Optics, and Port-Channel Balance
exclusions: Cisco Application Centric Infrastructure fabric-wide **`topology/health`** numeric scorecards (**UC-18.1.1**); **`faultInst`** catalogue trending (**UC-18.1.2**); **`fvCEp`** endpoint mobility (**UC-18.1.3**); **`vzBrCP`** contract permit/deny analytics (**UC-18.1.4**); APIC **`infraCluster`** controller quorum (**UC-18.1.7**); **`fvAEPg`** roll-up health (**UC-18.1.10**); Cisco Nexus 9000 **standalone** NX-OS fabrics (**UC-18.4.x**); APIC clusters older than supported **6.0(x)** trains.
evidence: Saved search **`aci_uc1816_phys_iface_saturation`** on **`index=cisco_aci`** (**`cisco:aci:interface`**, **`cisco:aci:optics`**, **`cisco:aci:syslog`**) plus Dashboard Studio workbook **`ds_aci_phys_iface_health.json`** wired with **`tok_pod`**/**`tok_if`** drill tokens.
dataSources: `index=cisco_aci` (rename per governance) merging **`sourcetype=cisco:aci:interface`** REST-polled **`eqptIngrTotal5min`**, **`eqptEgrTotal5min`**, **`eqptIngrDropPkts5min`**, **`eqptEgrDropPkts5min`**, **`l1PhysIf`**, **`pcAggrIf`**, **`pcRsMbrIfs`**, **`vpcMbrEpg`**, **`eqptDdiPDp`**, **`l1RtdConfig`** extracts plus **`sourcetype=cisco:aci:optics`** optical telemetry and **`sourcetype=cisco:aci:syslog`** (**Splunk_TA_cisco-aci**, Splunkbase **4022**) carrying **ETHPORT-5-IF_DOWN**, **ETHPORT-5-IF_UP**, **INTERFACE-3-IF_INPUT_DROP**, **OPTICS-3-OPTICAL_RX_LOW**; HTTPS **`GET`** paths include **`/api/node/class/topology/pod-{id}/node-{id}/sys/phys-[eth1/X]/HCounters5min.json`**, **`/api/node/class/eqptIngrTotal5min.json`**, **`/api/node/class/eqptEgrTotal5min.json`**, **`/api/node/class/eqptIngrDropPkts5min.json`**, **`/api/node/class/eqptDdiPDp.json`** polled **60–300s**; optional **gNMI** **`interface-counters`** streaming from leaf/spine; **Nexus Dashboard Insights** **`GET https://<nd-insights>/sedgeapi/v1/site_health`** per-interface widgets; SNMP **IF-MIB** via Splunk Add-on for SNMP for legacy correlation.
app: **Splunk_TA_cisco-aci** ([Splunkbase **4022**](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4022), package **`Splunk_TA_cisco-aci`**) for **`cisco:aci:syslog`** normalization; **Splunk REST API Modular Input** (**rest_ta**, Splunkbase **1546**) or Python collectors authenticated with **`aaaLogin.json`**/**`aaaRefresh.json`** emitting **`cisco:aci:interface`** and **`cisco:aci:optics`**; optional **Splunk Add-on for SNMP** for IF-MIB correlation.
spl:
index=cisco_aci (sourcetype="cisco:aci:interface" OR sourcetype="cisco:aci:optics" OR sourcetype="cisco:aci:syslog") earliest=-4h@m
| eval layer=case(sourcetype=="cisco:aci:interface","iface",sourcetype=="cisco:aci:optics","optics",sourcetype=="cisco:aci:syslog","syslog",1=1,"other")
| eval syslog_keep=if(layer=="syslog" AND match(_raw,"(?i)(ETHPORT-5-(IF_DOWN|IF_UP)|INTERFACE-3-IF_INPUT_DROP|OPTICS-3-OPTICAL_RX_LOW)"),1,0)
| eval bytes_in=if(layer!="syslog",tonumber(coalesce(bytes_ingress_5min,"0")),null())
| eval bytes_out=if(layer!="syslog",tonumber(coalesce(bytes_egress_5min,"0")),null())
| eval pkts_in=if(layer!="syslog",tonumber(coalesce(pkts_ingress_5min,"0")),null())
| eval pkts_out=if(layer!="syslog",tonumber(coalesce(pkts_egress_5min,"0")),null())
| eval speed_gbps=if(layer!="syslog",tonumber(coalesce(speed_gbps,speedGbps,"0")),null())
| eval phys_if_id=if(layer!="syslog",trim(coalesce(phys_if_id,ifId,"")),null())
| eval node_id=if(layer!="syslog",trim(coalesce(node_id,fabricNode,node,"")),null())
| eval pod_id=if(layer!="syslog",trim(coalesce(pod_id,pod,"")),null())
| eval drop_buffer_pkts=if(layer!="syslog",tonumber(coalesce(drop_buffer_pkts,bufferPkts,"0")),null())
| eval drop_forwarding_pkts=if(layer!="syslog",tonumber(coalesce(drop_forwarding_pkts,forwardingPkts,"0")),null())
| eval drop_error_pkts=if(layer!="syslog",tonumber(coalesce(drop_error_pkts,errorPkts,"0")),null())
| eval drops_total=if(layer!="syslog",drop_buffer_pkts+drop_forwarding_pkts+drop_error_pkts,null())
| eval tp=if(layer!="syslog",pkts_in+pkts_out+coalesce(drops_total,0),null())
| eval drop_rate=if(layer!="syslog" AND tp>0,round(100*coalesce(drops_total,0)/tp,4),null())
| eval capacity_bits=if(layer!="syslog" AND speed_gbps>0,speed_gbps*5*60*1000000000,null())
| eval util_pct=if(layer!="syslog" AND isnotnull(capacity_bits) AND capacity_bits>0,round(100*max(bytes_in,bytes_out)*8/capacity_bits,3),null())
| eval optical_rx_power_dbm=if(layer!="syslog",tonumber(coalesce(optical_rx_power_dbm,rxPower,"")),null())
| eval optical_budget_violation=if(isnotnull(optical_rx_power_dbm) AND optical_rx_power_dbm<-7,1,0)
| eval pc_id=if(layer!="syslog",trim(coalesce(port_channel_id,pcAggrIf_dn,"")),null())
| eval member_role=if(layer!="syslog",lower(trim(coalesce(member_role,""))),null())
| where layer!="syslog" OR syslog_keep=1
| where layer!="syslog"
| bin _time span=5m as ts5
| stats latest(bytes_in) as bytes_in latest(drop_rate) as drop_rate latest(drops_total) as drops_total latest(util_pct) as util_pct latest(optical_rx_power_dbm) as optical_rx_power_dbm latest(optical_budget_violation) as optical_budget_violation latest(speed_gbps) as speed_gbps latest(member_role) as member_role latest(pod_id) as pod_id by ts5 node_id phys_if_id pc_id
| eventstats sum(bytes_in) as pc_bytes sum(eval(if(member_role=="primary",bytes_in,null()))) as prim_b sum(eval(if(member_role=="secondary",bytes_in,null()))) as sec_b by ts5 pc_id
| eval member_skew_pct=if(isnotnull(pc_id) AND pc_id!="" AND pc_bytes>0,round(100*abs(prim_b-sec_b)/pc_bytes,2),null())
| eval risk_iface=util_pct>=75 OR drop_rate>=0.5 OR optical_budget_violation=1 OR member_skew_pct>20
| where risk_iface=1 OR drop_rate>0 OR optical_budget_violation=1 OR drops_total>0
| sort - util_pct - drop_rate
| head 200
| table ts5 pod_id node_id phys_if_id pc_id util_pct drop_rate drops_total optical_rx_power_dbm optical_budget_violation member_skew_pct
description: Splunk tracks Cisco Application Centric Infrastructure leaf and spine physical interfaces using Managed Objects **l1PhysIf** (**admin_state**, **oper_state**, negotiated **speed**, **usage** counters) paired with rolling fabric statistics **eqptIngrTotal5min** / **eqptEgrTotal5min** byte and packet aggregates, granular drop decomposition inside **eqptIngrDropPkts5min** and **eqptEgrDropPkts5min** (**bufferPkts**, **forwardingPkts**, **errorPkts**, **afdWredPkts**), physical-layer error telemetry **eqptIngrCrcErrPkts5min** / **eqptIngrUnkErrPkts5min**, optical diagnostics **eqptDdiPDp** (**txPower**, **rxPower**, **temperature** Celsius), storm-control drops **eqptStorm**, port-channel aggregates **pcAggrIf** plus membership roles **pcRsMbrIfs**, virtual Port-Channel saturation indicators tied to **vpcMbrEpg** peer-link pressure, and link-flap counters surfaced via **l1RtdConfig** reset semantics—correlating REST-polled counters with syslog mnemonics for interface state transitions so operators distinguish sustained ECMP imbalance from cabling faults ahead of silent discard growth.
value: Hot leaf-to-spine links exhaust buffers before dashboards blame tenants—byte-derived utilization, drop taxonomy, optical headroom, and member skew tell you whether to add bandwidth, rebalance port-channels, or replace marginal optics before latency tickets spread east-west.
implementation:
Deploy **Splunk_TA_cisco-aci** (Splunkbase **4022**) syslog receivers plus scripted HTTPS collectors authenticated via **`aaaLogin.json`**/**`aaaRefresh.json`** emitting **`cisco:aci:interface`** and **`cisco:aci:optics`** JSON aligned to **`eqptIngrTotal5min`**/**`eqptEgrTotal5min`**/**`eqptIngrDropPkts5min`** MO pulls; codify **`FIELDALIAS`** macros for **`phys_if_id`**, **`bytes_ingress_5min`**, **`drop_buffer_pkts`**, **`optical_rx_power_dbm`**; schedule utilization, drop-rate, optics-budget, and **`member_skew_pct`** alerts with **`CHG`** suppression lookups.

**Quick win:** Fifteen-minute **`index=cisco_aci`** search (**`cisco:aci:interface`**, **`cisco:aci:optics`**) for **`util_pct≥75`** or **`optical_budget_violation=1`**—surfaces hotspots early.
visualization: (1) Heatmap — **`node_id`** × **`phys_if_id`** **`util_pct`** (five-minute bins). (2) Top-N **`drop_rate`** column chart split by **`drop_buffer_pkts`** vs **`drop_forwarding_pkts`**. (3) Optical budget panel — table of **`optical_rx_power_dbm`** with **`optical_budget_violation`** badge. (4) Port-channel **`member_skew_pct`** bar comparing bonded members sharing **`pc_id`**. (5) Link-flap timeline — **`ETHPORT-5`** syslog markers correlated to **`util_pct`**. (6) Optional **NDI** per-site deep-link tile fed by **`tok_pod`**.
schema: CIM **Network_Traffic** overlays bytes/packets/drops at physical interfaces while **Performance** carries utilization percentages, optical gauges, and trending derivatives keyed by **`phys_if_id`**/**`node_id`**.

references.title: Cisco APIC Layer 2 Networking Configuration Guide — Physical Interfaces (Release 6.0(x))
Cisco Transceiver Module Compatibility Matrix (TMG Matrix)
Cisco Nexus Dashboard Insights API Overview — site_health & telemetry widgets
Cisco Nexus 9000 Series Switches — troubleshooting technical references (interface counters)

knownFalsePositives: **Planned port-channel rebalance windows** — cabling teams shift LAG members or reweight spine-hashed uplinks during approved maintenance—**`bytes_ingress_5min`** diverges sharply between **`pcRsMbrIfs`** participants for minutes while packet loss stays at lab noise; correlate Splunk timelines against **`CHG`** bundles that cite spine-side rebalance phases before escalating to sev-1 fabric bridges. **BGP route-refresh uplink bursts** — northbound spine sessions may deliver short **route-refresh** storms that inflate five-minute byte counters without sustained **`drop_forwarding_pkts`** growth; cross-check neighbor event logs whenever utilization alone spikes without drops. **Optics replacement rehearsal intervals** — staged **QSFP**/**SFP** swaps lift transient **`OPTICS-3-OPTICAL_RX_LOW`** narratives at insertion yet settle once power levels stabilize; mute optics macros when **`CHG`** records cite cold-standby cage kits and insertion-loss baselines documented in hardware tickets. **Post-rack-airflow HVAC reset cooling cycles** — intentional aisle reversals jog **`eqptDdiPDp`** temperature digits near transient warm points while **`crc_err_pkts`** remain flat—pair telemetry with facility **`CHG`** identifiers rather than cabling escalation queues alone. **vPC peer-keepalive micro-bursts during isolation drills** — maintenance bridges momentarily widen peer-link drop fractions mirrored by **`vpcMbrEpg`** saturation widgets yet recover once heartbeat routing restores—require **`CHG`** acknowledgement tokens before labeling chronic peer saturation unrelated to rehearsal scopes.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• **Splunk_TA_cisco-aci** (Splunkbase 4022) installed where APIC and Nexus facility=local6 syslog terminates—normalize `**sourcetype=cisco:aci:syslog**` lines carrying mnemonics **ETHPORT-5-IF_DOWN**, **ETHPORT-5-IF_UP**, **INTERFACE-3-IF_INPUT_DROP**, **OPTICS-3-OPTICAL_RX_LOW** alongside REST-fed `**sourcetype=cisco:aci:interface**` and `**sourcetype=cisco:aci:optics**` streams emitted by scripted HTTPS collectors authenticated via `**POST /api/aaaLogin.json**` and `**POST /api/aaaRefresh.json**` (~10 minute cookie cadence).
• Dedicated automation identities isolated from GUI admins; RBAC scopes covering `network-admin` read paths without `aaa` mutation privileges unless audits demand scripted remediation.
• Heavy Forwarders or modular inputs reaching `https://<apic>/api/node/class/` class pulls against `**eqptIngrTotal5min**`, `**eqptEgrTotal5min**`, `**eqptIngrDropPkts5min**`, `**eqptEgrDropPkts5min**`, `**eqptIngrCrcErrPkts5min**`, `**eqptIngrUnkErrPkts5min**`, `**eqptDdiPDp**`, `**eqptStorm**`, `**l1PhysIf**`, `**pcAggrIf**`, `**pcRsMbrIfs**`, `**vpcMbrEpg**`, `**l1RtdConfig**` plus parameterized `topology/pod-{pod}/node-{node}/sys/phys-[eth1/X]/` subtree pulls exposing `**HCounters5min.json**` aggregates—poll 60–300s balancing APIC CPU versus freshness.
• Optional **gNMI** dial-out (**interface-counters** sensor family) from leaf/spine **NX-OS** toward Splunk HEC when telemetry budgets exist; normalize `**phys_if_id**` joins consistent with REST `dn` facets.
• **Nexus Dashboard Insights** (**NDI**) `**GET https://<nd-insights>/sedgeapi/v1/site_health**` widgets exposing per-interface strain tiles—**OAuth** secrets rotated quarterly.
• Legacy reconciliation via Splunk Add-on for **SNMP** (**IF-MIB** `**ifHCInOctets**`, `**ifHCOutOctets**`, `ifInErrors`) when parallel SNMP traps supplement REST gaps.

Step 1 — Data sources
(1) REST topology pulls: `GET https://<apic>/api/node/class/topology/pod-{id}/node-{id}/sys/phys-[eth1/X]/HCounters5min.json` harvests rolling histogram counters paired with `GET .../api/node/class/eqptIngrTotal5min.json` / `eqptEgrTotal5min.json` byte and packet aggregates aligned to five-minute buckets referenced alongside `eqptIngrDropPkts5min` / `eqptEgrDropPkts5min` where `**bufferPkts**`, `**forwardingPkts**`, `**errorPkts**`, `**afdWredPkts**` attributes classify discard taxonomy independent of `eqptStorm` broadcast/multicast policing drops.
(2) CRC / unknown-error lanes: `eqptIngrCrcErrPkts5min` plus `eqptIngrUnkErrPkts5min` isolate PHY-layer impairment distinct from buffering drops—schedule merged pulls when optics skeptics escalate without `INTERFACE-3-IF_INPUT_DROP` syslog corroboration.
(3) Optical diagnostics: `GET .../api/node/class/eqptDdiPDp.json` surfaces `**txPower**`, `**rxPower**`, Celsius `temperature` readings supporting **optical-budget** math versus Cisco-published thresholds—pair Splunk thresholds (−7 dBm warning heuristic cited in SPL sample) with organizational optics engineering variance.
(4) Port-channel context: `pcAggrIf` distinguished names tie hashed uplinks while `pcRsMbrIfs` exposes `**member_role**` (primary, secondary) enabling imbalance ratios whenever `**bytes_ingress_5min**` skew diverges beyond governance percentages across bonded members sharing `**pod_id**`/`**node_id**` scopes.
(5) vPC saturation hints: `vpcMbrEpg` telemetry plus syslog narratives referencing **peer-link** pressure contextualize spine-facing saturation distinct from orphan uplinks—still anchored on physical-byte counters rather than tenant contracts alone.
(6) Link-flap trending: `l1RtdConfig` counters reflecting administrative resets versus dataplane-initiated flap storms complement syslog `ETHPORT-5` sequences when distinguishing cabling faults from scripted `shutdown` sequences during infrastructure rehearsals.
(7) Syslog corroboration: `Splunk_TA_cisco-aci` maps `cisco:aci:syslog` severity tiers—never substitute syslog math for `eqptIngrTotal5min` totals yet indispensable when REST collectors stall behind **HTTP 429** back-pressure during dense fabrics.

Step 2 — Field extractions
Normalize `**FIELDALIAS**` macros after `**fieldsummary**` passes across blended transports—canonical Splunk fields include `phys_if_id`, `node_id`, `pod_id`, `**admin_state**`, `**oper_state**`, `**speed_gbps**` sourced from `l1PhysIf` attributes plus negotiated optics rows; `bytes_ingress_5min`/`**bytes_egress_5min**`/`**pkts_ingress_5min**`/`**pkts_egress_5min**` lifted from `eqptIngrTotal5min`/`eqptEgrTotal5min` children aligned through `dn` ancestry; `**drop_buffer_pkts**`, `**drop_forwarding_pkts**`, `**drop_error_pkts**` parsed from `eqptIngrDropPkts5min` attribute bundles (mirror egress counterparts when spine telemetry warrants symmetry); `**crc_err_pkts**`/`unk_err_pkts` referencing `eqptIngrCrcErrPkts5min` siblings; `**optical_tx_power_dbm**`, `**optical_rx_power_dbm**`, `**optical_temperature_c**` emitted by `eqptDdiPDp` payloads; `**port_channel_id**`/`member_role` expressing `pcAggrIf` versus `pcRsMbrIfs` semantics; `vpc_peer_hint` optional derived tokens tying `vpcMbrEpg` saturation to physical member rows. Stamp `**collector_id**` metadata when parallel modular inputs authenticate toward the same APIC VIP yet emit duplicate MO lines.

Step 3 — Initial validation
(1) Compare Splunk `**util_pct**` outputs against APIC GUI Topology → Switch Inventory → Interface tabs for identical `phys_if_id` values—delta beyond one poll hints duplicate collectors or `aaaRefresh` skew.
(2) On the leaf or spine, run NX-OS `**show interface counters errors**` referencing the same port—CRC tallies align with `crc_err_pkts` when clocking and optics healthy; divergence flags parser drift.
(3) Open NDI per-interface widgets (tokenized dashboards) validating five-minute throughput shapes against Splunk `**timechart**` overlays for the `node_id` / rack pair.
(4) SNMP IF-MIB spot checks from a vendor-neutral collector (SolarWinds, Prometheus exporter, etc.) confirm byte counters remain directionally consistent even if absolute values differ due to polling offsets.
(5) Archive screenshot evidence whenever Splunk surfaces drop classification growth before GUI refresh— `_indextime` minus `_time` histograms expose transport lag versus APIC scheduler delay.

Step 4 — SPL building blocks
(1) Utilization percentage—for each poll, compute `bytes_5min` max(ingress,egress) against wire capacity: `capacity_bits = speed_gbps * 5 * 60 * 1e9` then `util_pct = 100 * (bytes_5min * 8) / capacity_bits`—guard null `speed_gbps` when `l1PhysIf` still reports `admin_state=down` yet historical counters linger in index.
(2) Drop-rate trending—derive `drops_total = drop_buffer_pkts + drop_forwarding_pkts + drop_error_pkts` (optionally include afdWredPkts when exported separately) versus `throughput_pkts = pkts_ingress_5min + pkts_egress_5min` to compute `**drop_rate**` percentages—surface bursts distinct from optical fades when `crc_err_pkts` climbs simultaneously.
(3) Error-rate thresholds—alert when `crc_err_pkts` derivatives exceed baseline multiples per `phys_if_id` while `drop_buffer_pkts` stays flat—likely optics or DAC marginal quality versus congestion.
(4) Optical budget violations—flag `optical_rx_power_dbm < -7` dBm warning heuristic (adjust per optics BOM) paired with `optical_temperature_c` drift correlating HVAC excursions documented under rack telemetry feeds.
(5) Port-channel imbalance—within identical `pc_id`, compute `**member_skew_pct** = abs(primary_bytes-secondary_bytes)/sum(member_bytes)`; thresholds commonly 20% skew requiring hashing audits or faulty member optics.
(6) Link-flap trending—increment counters when syslog **ETHPORT-5** sequences spike per `phys_if_id` or REST `l1RtdConfig` resets climb faster than `**MTBF**` governance curves—differentiate administrative `shutdown` sequences captured via `**aaaModLR**` audits.

Step 5 — Comprehensive enrichment patterns (deepest section)
• NDI per-interface health correlation: join Splunk `pod_id` tokens to `site_health` responses so interface-specific heat tiles and Splunk KPIs reconcile before paging—map OAuth scopes per site and log 429 responses for governance.
• **CMDB** **rack-elevation** lookups: enrich `node_id` with `aci_leaf_rack_inventory` CSV keyed to cage, row, RU elevation so cabling teams receive physical context when `member_skew_pct` indicates patch inconsistency versus hardware failure.
• **ServiceNow** **CHG** stitching: nightly CHG extracts tag planned **port-channel** rebalance, SFP swap, or peer-link maintenance windows—auto-suppress **Sev-3** interface alerts when `CHG` metadata ties to the `phys_if_id` tuple under work.
• **Cisco TAC** SR open-state overlays: KV store or lookup table mirrors SR identifiers with TAC engineer ownership—bubble SR= tokens into pager notes when `**optical_budget_violation**` persists beyond hardware warranty review cycles.
• Cisco optics compatibility matrix: nightly curl of **`https://tmgmatrix.cisco.com/`** (or internal mirror) verifying SKU pairing for suspect QSFP/SFP combinations—Splunk `optical_rx_power_dbm` breaches matched to unqualified optics raise procurement flags.
• MITRE ATT&CK **T1499.001** (endpoint denial of service—flooding): annotate hunts where `drop_forwarding_pkts` spikes correlate with asymmetric `bytes_ingress_5min` storms indicative of hostile flood attempts versus legitimate elephant flows—still validate against `CHG` before declaring adversarial outcomes.
• **Splunk ITSI** service trees: map `phys_if_id` → leaf pair → fabric POD → tenant services—bubble KPI faults toward application episodes without duplicating UC-18.1.1 fabric-wide composite scores; optional Splunk ITSI **Predictive Analytics** forecasts `util_pct` crossing capacity corridors across quarterly horizons using seasonal adjustments keyed on `CHG` calendars.
• Per-port environmental telemetry: blend `optical_temperature_c` with `snmp`/sensor feeds from adjacent racks—rising temperature gradients preceding `OPTICS-3` syslog hints HVAC regressions distinct from optics aging alone.
• **LLDP** neighbor verification: optional `lldpAdjEp` REST snapshots cross-check `phys_if_id` versus upstream ToR identities—Splunk mismatches versus expected neighbor table drive cabling shop tickets before optics replacement spend authorizes blindly.

Step 6 — Operational runbook
• Interface-saturation Sev-3 paging—fire when `util_pct ≥ 75%` for 15 consecutive five-minute buckets on any leaf→spine facing link not covered by `CHG` suppress macros; include `drop_rate`, `member_skew_pct`, `pod_id`, `node_id` in **PagerDuty** bridges. MTBF target ≥720 hours between actionable fabric-interface saturation pages exclusive of planned maintenance; **MTTR** target ≤45 minutes from Splunk acknowledgement to restored headroom verified via `show interface` samples.
• Optical-budget **Sev-2** paging—`optical_rx_power_dbm` below organizational floor or `OPTICS-3-OPTICAL_RX_LOW` bursts without approved SFP swap tickets—pair with TAC optics guidance; MTTR ≤30 minutes when cold-standby optics kits staged per rack elevation.
• Link-flap Sev-2 paging—`ETHPORT-5` cadence exceeding 3 events / 15 minutes on production leaf uplinks absent maintenance metadata; require NX-OS `show logging last 50` attachments and LLDP validation before replacing hardware.
• Dashboard token wiring: standardize `**tok_pod**`, `**tok_node**`, `**tok_if**`, `**tok_pc**` across **Dashboard Studio** workbooks feeding (1) interface utilization heatmap by `node_id` × `phys_if_id`, (2) drop-rate top-N stacked area chart by `drop_buffer_pkts` category, (3) optical budget violations table with `optical_rx_power_dbm` sparkline, (4) port-channel-member skew bar comparing `primary`/`secondary` bytes, (5) **link-flap** timeline layering syslog `ETHPORT-5` markers atop `util_pct` baselines—sixth optional panel inserts NDI deep-link tiles per site.

Troubleshooting highlights
• HTTP 429 responses from APIC—widen intervals or shard `eqpt*` classes across multiple modular inputs.
• Duplicate collector rows double `bytes_ingress_5min` until `collector_id` deduplication joins land.
• CamelCase drift after TA upgrades blanks `drop_buffer_pkts`—inspect `_raw` JSON and expand `coalesce()` chains cautiously after vendor confirmation.
• gNMI vs REST divergence—choose authoritative path per observability charter; Splunk must not double-count merged streams lacking shared dedupe keys.
grandmaExplanation: We measure how busy each spine-facing cable runs across five-minute slices and whether receive light stays inside budget—so crowded pipes, rising drops, or dim optics ring before everyday east-west apps feel sluggish.

premiumApps.name: Splunk ITSI
premiumApps.note: optional service-tree roll-up + predictive overlays per port-to-tenant wiring
